translations.[App Store Connect API 現已支援 讀取和管理 Custom: [App Store Connect API now supports reading and managing Customer Reviews](../f1365e51902c/). This bot will implement this in future updates to replace the current method of fetching reviews from the backend using Fastlane — Spaceship.
translations.[ZReviewsBot](https://github.com/ZhgChgL: [ZReviewsBot](https://github.com/ZhgChgLi/ZReviewsBot){:target="_blank"} is a free, open-source project that helps your app team automatically track the latest reviews of your app on the App Store (iOS) and Google Play (Android) platforms, and send them to a designated Slack channel for real-time updates on your app’s status.

translations.現已改用全新的 [App Store Connect API](../f1365: The App Reviews Bot has been redesigned using the brand-new [App Store Connect API](../f1365e51902c/) and relaunched as "[ZReviewTender — Free and Open Source App Reviews Monitoring Bot](../e36e48bb9265/)".
translations.繼上一篇「 [AppStore APP’s Reviews Slack Bot: Following the previous study "[AppStore APP’s Reviews Slack Bot 那些事](../cb0c68c33994/)," I completed a new iOS review fetching tool. I thought it would be suitable as a side project open source for others facing the same issue.
